action_set_definitions.name: get_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current details and status of a specific zoning variance application.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning variance case (e.g., VAR-2024-0902).

action_set_definitions.name: get_parcel_compliance_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the code enforcement history for a specific parcel, including open violations and unpermitted structures.

parcel_id.description: The legal identification number of the land parcel.

action_set_definitions.name: get_zoning_and_overlay_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the zoning district classification and any applicable overlay districts (e.g., Historic Overlay) for a parcel.

parcel_id.description: The legal identification number of the land parcel.

action_set_definitions.name: update_application_record
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the staff review by updating the application status and appending the Findings of Fact and recommended mitigation measures.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning variance case.

new_status.description: The next stage in the workflow based on review findings.

findings_of_fact.description: A detailed summary of the interaction between requested relief, site constraints, and compliance history.

recommended_mitigation.description: List of recommended measures to mitigate the impact of the variance.

state_description.application_id: The unique identifier for the zoning variance case.
state_description.parcel_id: The legal identification number of the land parcel.
state_description.current_status: Current stage of the workflow (e.g., PENDING, UNDER_REVIEW, PUBLIC_NOTICE, COMPLETED).
state_description.zoning_district: The specific zoning classification of the property (e.g., R-1, C-2).
state_description.variance_type: The nature of the deviation requested (e.g., Side-yard Setback, Height Increase).
state_description.submitted_documents: List of filenames provided by the applicant.
state_description.public_hearing_scheduled: Whether a date has been set for the Zoning Board of Appeals hearing.
state_description.neighbor_objections: The number of formal complaints received from property owners within 300 feet.
